hooks.name: Run page tests on UI change
hooks.description: When a frontend page component is saved, suggest running the corresponding Playwright test to verify the change didn't break anything.

action.prompt: A frontend page component was just modified. To ensure nothing broke, run the corresponding Playwright test. Map the page path to the test file: /brainâ†’brain.spec.ts, /createâ†’create.spec.ts, /talentâ†’talent.spec.ts, /assetsâ†’assets.spec.ts, /modelsâ†’models.spec.ts, /adminâ†’admin.spec.ts, /trainingâ†’training.spec.ts, /settingsâ†’settings.spec.ts, /productionâ†’production.spec.ts, /publishâ†’publish.spec.ts, /analyticsâ†’analytics.spec.ts, /editorâ†’editor.spec.ts, /workflowsâ†’workflows.spec.ts, /admin/fleetâ†’fleet.spec.ts. Run: `cd frontend && npx playwright test e2e/{matched}.spec.ts --project=desktop --workers=1`. If tests fail, diagnose using .kiro/steering/uat-system.md patterns and fix. Update the steering file with results.
